    1. registerMBeans(SystemInfo, MBeanServer)

Interface StrategyRegistrationPlatformMBeans

All Known Implementing Classes:
WindowsStrategyRegistrattionPlatform
public interface StrategyRegistrationPlatformMBeans
Strategy for registering platform-specific MBeans.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    registerMBeans(SystemInfo systemInfo, MBeanServer mBeanServer)
    Registers MBeans for the given system info.

  • Method Details

    • registerMBeans

      void registerMBeans(SystemInfo systemInfo, MBeanServer mBeanServer) throws NotCompliantMBeanException, InstanceAlreadyExistsException, MBeanRegistrationException, MalformedObjectNameException, IntrospectionException, IntrospectionException
      Registers MBeans for the given system info.
      Parameters:
      systemInfo - the system info
      mBeanServer - the MBean server
      Throws:
      NotCompliantMBeanException - if MBean is not compliant
      InstanceAlreadyExistsException - if instance exists
      MBeanRegistrationException - if registration fails
      MalformedObjectNameException - if object name is malformed
      IntrospectionException - if introspection fails
      IntrospectionException - if JMX introspection fails
